summary: Backend: 16/16 pytest tests PASSED (auth, quotes, contact, status updates, authorization). Frontend: Home/Services/Quote/Contact/Admin Login/Admin Dashboard pages all render correctly; admin login → dashboard → status update (toast 'Status updated' shown) → logout all work. Quote/Contact form field testids differ from request spec naming (quote-input-name vs quote-name-input) but all fields exist and are functional.

console_warnings.issue: React warning: 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (AdminLogin)'. Likely a setState/navigate call during render instead of inside useEffect.

GET /api/auth/me returns 401 on every public-page load (Home/Services/Quote/Contact). Expected because AuthContext checks session, but produces noisy console errors. Consider suppressing 401 logging for unauthenticated bootstrap.

action_items: Fix setState-during-render warning in AdminLogin.jsx (wrap redirect/navigate in useEffect when user becomes authenticated).

OPTIONAL: Align data-testid names with naming convention used in the spec (current: quote-input-name, contact-input-name, quote-input-sqft, quote-input-notes; spec referenced: quote-name-input, contact-name-input, etc.). Either is fine, but consistency helps automation.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS allows only FRONTEND_URL + localhost — good (credentials require explicit origins). Confirmed working.
Cookie set with samesite='none', secure=True, httpOnly=True — correct for cross-origin preview domain.
Admin seed is idempotent and updates password hash if changed — good.
Mongo _id is excluded via projection and doc.pop — good.
JWT_SECRET pulled from env (no default) — good.
@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ quote and 1 TEST_ contact via backend tests; visible in admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints fully covered in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (auth, quotes, contact, authorization, status updates). Frontend testids use prefix 'quote-input-*', 'contact-input-*', and 'admin-*'. Dashboard quote rows use 'quote-row-{id}' and 'quote-status-select-{id}'. Logout button is 'admin-logout-btn'. Quote form submit via UI was not exercised due to testid name mismatch in initial script, but all inputs are present and backend POST /api/quotes works perfectly. If retesting frontend submits, use correct prefix 'quote-input-name' / 'contact-input-name'.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. The only code-quality issue is a React setState-in-render warning in AdminLogin that does not affect functionality.
